taskAnswer1:
x = tf.constant([5, 2, 20, 15, 32, 100])
new_x = tf.where(
  tf.boolean_mask(x, x % 5 == 0) % 10 != 0,
  tf.square(tf.boolean_mask(x, x % 5 == 0)),
  tf.boolean_mask(x, x % 5 == 0)
)
print(new_x)
taskAnswer2:
x = tf.constant([4, 12, 8, 8])
new_x = tf.squeeze(
  tf.nn.conv1d(
    tf.reshape(x, [1, int(x.shape[0]), 1]),
    tf.constant([[[2]], [[1]]]),
    1,
    'VALID'
  )
)
print(new_x)
taskAnswer3:
x = tf.constant(
  [[1, 2, 3],
  [101, 102, 103],
  [11, 12, 13]]
)
new_x = tf.math.reduce_max(
  tf.math.reduce_min(
    tf.boolean_mask(x, tf.range(len(x)) % 2 == 0),
    axis=1
  )
)
print(new_x)

x = tf.constant([5, 2, 20, 15, 32, 100])

new_x = tf.where(
  tf.boolean_mask(x, x % 5 == 0) % 10 != 0, # mask numbers divisible by 5 and not 10
  tf.square(tf.boolean_mask(x, x % 5 == 0)), #square these numbers 
  tf.boolean_mask(x, x % 5 == 0) # keep all other #s divisible by 5
)


olg_x = tf.where(
  tf.boolean_mask(x, x % 2 == 0) % 10 == 0, #mask
  tf.square(tf.boolean_mask(x, x % 2 == 0)),
  tf.boolean_mask(x, x % 2 == 0)
)

print(new_x)

where_result = []
for where_i in range(len([n for n in x if ((n % 2) == 0)])):
  if (([n for n in x if ((n % 2) == 0)][where_i] % 10) == 0): # if remainder when div by 2 is 0 (aka is even) and divisible by 10
    where_result.append([n for n in x if ((n % 2) == 0)][where_i] ** 2) # square if divisible by 10
  else:
    where_result.append([n for n in x if ((n % 2) == 0)][where_i]) #if not divisible by 10 don't square
new_x = where_result

filters = [[[1]], [[1]], [[1]]]

  for conv_j in range(len(filters)):
    conv_sum += inputs[0][conv_i + conv_j][0] * filters[conv_j][0][0]
  conv_result[0].append([conv_sum])
squeeze_result = [n[0] for n in conv_result[0]]
python_x = squeeze_result

taskAnswer1:
import tensorflow as tf

x = tf.constant([5, 2, 20, 15, 32, 100])

divisible_by_5= x % 5 == 0
x_divisible_by_5= tf.boolean_mask(x, divisible_by_5)

divisible_by_10_not_5 = x % 10 == 0
x_divisible_by_10_not_5 = tf.boolean_mask(x, divisible_by_10_not_5)

squared_elements = tf.square(x_divisible_by_10_not_5)

new_x= tf.concat([x_divisible_by_5, squared_elements], axis=0)


print(new_x)
